idea: Create a complete go-to-market package for Saudi restaurant digital marketing services including: (1) Ideal Client Profile (ICP) defining target restaurant segments, decision-makers, pain points, and budget capacity; (2) Messaging framework addressing Saudi restaurant-specific challenges (online ordering, delivery integration, local SEO, WhatsApp marketing); (3) Lead generation strategy prioritizing LinkedIn outreach to restaurant owners/managers, local business networks (Chambers of Commerce), and referral partnerships; (4) 2-3 case study templates showcasing restaurant marketing ROI (reservation increases, delivery platform optimization, social media engagement); (5) CRM setup guide for prospect tracking; (6) 90-day acquisition roadmap with efficiency metrics given $5000 budget constraint
idea_summary: Create a complete go-to-market package for Saudi restaurant digital marketing services including: (1) Ideal Client Profile (ICP) defining target restaurant segments, decision-makers, pain points, and budget capacity; (2) Messaging framework addressing Saudi restaurant-specific challenges (online ordering, delivery integration, local SEO, WhatsApp marketing); (3) Lead generation strategy prioritizing LinkedIn outreach to restaurant owners/managers, local business networks (Chambers of Commerce), and referral partnerships; (4) 2-3 case study templates showcasing restaurant marketing ROI (reservation increases, delivery platform optimization, social media engagement); (5) CRM setup guide for prospect tracking; (6) 90-day acquisition roadmap with efficiency metrics given $5000 budget constraint
